text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
404 
PRE_ICL_TIER_DRUG_TYPE 
LABEL: 
Pre-ICL Drug Type by Tier 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies what types of drugs, if any, are covered on each formulary tier during the pre-
initial coverage limit (ICL) phase. A tier may include multiple drug types. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_TIER_DRUG_TYPE 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Binary character
